a.class: bg-card border border-border text-text py-3 px-6 rounded-theme font-semibold text-sm flex items-center gap-2 shadow-card hover:border-transparent hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary transition-fast

bg-card border border-border text-text py-3 px-6 rounded-theme font-semibold text-sm flex items-center gap-2 shadow-card hover:border-transparent hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary transition-fast
